mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, doctor_id, patient_name, patient_phone, disease_desc, appointment_time, duration, amount, status, pay_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from t_consult order by id desc
mapper.update: update t_consult set order_no = #{et.orderNo}, user_id = #{et.userId}, doctor_id = #{et.doctorId}, patient_name = #{et.patientName}, patient_phone = #{et.patientPhone}, disease_desc = #{et.diseaseDesc}, appointment_time = #{et.appointmentTime}, duration = #{et.duration}, amount = #{et.amount}, status = #{et.status}, pay_time = #{et.payTime}, create_time = #{et.createTime}, update_time = #{et.updateTime} where id = #{et.id}
